posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!
I’m Amichay, product manager for monday vibe, our new AI app builder.
As we shape its future, we’d love your input on pricing and roadmap features!
Please take this survey, and share it with any other monday user or partner.
Thanks!

Click here to take the survey

image1920×1080 145 KB

posts.author: BenWalker (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
image526×595 70.4 KB
I thinkit needs some more work before discussing pricing plans. This was a very simple request prompting 3-4 automations.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BenWalker, Thanks for the feedback.
We monitor the prompt success rate daily, and it’s improving every day.
To improve the success of your prompt, we recommend that you ask for changes gradually instead of asking for multiple changes at once.

Specifically about automations, vibe cannot create automations or workflows, it can only create board views.

You can ask it to automate some processes (creating/editing items), but they will only work when the vibe board view is open and not offline (unlike automations that will work any time the board is changed).

posts.author: BenWalker (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI Amichay,

Thanks for getting back to me.

That’s disappointing to hear, the longest part of creating a board is the automations, especially seeing as they don’t carry over with templates. I hope others find Vibe more useful. As honest feedback, unless I’m understanding it’s use incorrectly, it doesn’t really save much time, especially when most boards and views are already templated. the longest part of our setup tasks are the automations.
